summary: This is an exceptionally thorough test suite that covers all major requirements: status classification, config loading (file and string), report generation, markdown output, JSON output, error handling, and end-to-end integration. TDD cycle commentary clearly documents the red/green/refactor methodology. Boundary conditions are handled well — exact policy boundary (0 days left → Expired), exact warning boundary (14 days → Warning), 1-day outside window (15 days → OK), and custom warning window reclassification. Error scenarios (missing file, invalid JSON, missing required fields, unparseable dates) are explicitly tested with meaningful message patterns. BeforeAll blocks use fixed reference dates for full determinism, fixtures are organized in a dedicated directory, and the integration test validates real fixture data against hand-computed expected classifications. Rigor drops slightly because a few edge cases are absent: empty secrets array passed to Get-RotationReport, zero or negative PolicyDays/WarningDays values, and boundary behavior when LastRotated is in the future. The markdown assertions use regex patterns which are pragmatic but could miss structural regressions (e.g., column ordering). These are minor gaps in an otherwise production-quality test suite that would reliably catch regressions.
